# Used for Presentation
This file has been maintained in order to provide full transparency into any AI used in the generation of the presentation.  Anything not listed in this file was created uniquely by the author without AI assistance.  For example, the structure and outline for the presentation, the ideas, etc. and even writing this file itself were all done independent of any AI. 

Please note the actual prompts are listed here without cleanup.  Some may have typos, spelling errors or invalid capitalization and have not been corrected for the purpose of maintaining full transparency.
